originalTitle: The ChatGPT browser is already dead
summary: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it will be "sunsetting" Atlas and is targeting an […]
content: OpenAI is already shutting down ChatGPT Atlas, its browser that could do tasks for you on your behalf, less than a year after launching it. Atlas was announced in October, but as part of its wave of news about ChatGPT Work today, the company confirmed that it will be “sunsetting” Atlas and is targeting an August 9th date for deprecation. The shutdown follows OpenAI’s push to reduce “side quests” and catch up with Anthropic on productivity features. As part of that push, in March, The Wall Street Journal reported that OpenAI planned to combine the ChatGPT app, Codex, and Atlas into a desktop “superapp” — ChatGPT Work appears to be the result of those efforts. In a thread about the ChatGPT Work announcements, which includes an updated browser in the desktop ChatGPT app and a cloud browser for work mode, OpenAI’s James Sun said that: “All these capabilities were built on what we learned from Atlas users who took a leap of faith on a new browser. You taught us how agents can help make browsing and doing work on the open web better, and we are applying these learnings to these new products.”  In recent months, OpenAI has also shut down the video generation app Sora and paused plans for a ChatGPT “adult mode.” Update, July 9th: Added previous reporting about OpenAI’s plans to combine Atlas with its desktop app.
chineseSummary: OpenAI 已经关闭了 ChatGPT Atlas，它的浏览器可以代表你执行任务，距离推出不到一年。 Atlas 于 10 月宣布，但作为今天有关 ChatGPT Work 的新闻浪潮的一部分，该公司确认将“淘汰”Atlas，并瞄准 [...]
chineseContent: OpenAI 已经关闭了 ChatGPT Atlas，它的浏览器可以代表你执行任务，距离推出不到一年。 Atlas 于 10 月宣布，但作为今天有关 ChatGPT Work 的新闻浪潮的一部分，该公司确认将“淘汰”Atlas，并计划于 8 月 9 日弃用。此次关闭是在 OpenAI 努力减少“支线任务”并在生产力功能方面赶上 Anthropic 之后进行的。作为这一推动的一部分，《华尔街日报》在 3 月份报道称，OpenAI 计划将 ChatGPT 应用程序、Codex 和 Atlas 合并成一个桌面“超级应用程序”——ChatGPT Work 似乎就是这些努力的结果。在有关 ChatGPT Work 公告的帖子中，其中包括桌面 ChatGPT 应用程序中的更新浏览器和用于工作模式的云浏览器，OpenAI 的 James Sun 表示：“所有这些功能都是建立在我们从 Atlas 用户那里学到的基础上的，他们对新浏览器充满了信心。你们教会了我们代理如何帮助我们更好地在开放网络上浏览和工作，我们正在将这些知识应用到这些新产品中。”  近几个月来，OpenAI 还关闭了视频生成应用 Sora，并暂停了 ChatGPT“成人模式”的计划。 7 月 9 日更新：添加了之前有关 OpenAI 计划将 Atlas 与其桌面应用程序结合起来的报道。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
